title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Jack, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Indeed... the MINK Tribe transform into...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ravenous beast warriors in the night of the full moon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But never again will you dream of laying a finger on kaido San!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've been waiting for you- gara

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: destroyed our country that had stood for over a 1000 years!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I've because he was looking for "THAT" man

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My life has been protected in this battle!! So I intend to pay that debt two fold!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bring it on!!! we have "ALL KINDS OF ANIMALS" here too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bastard Jack has really done it and went up there

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not like you're the sensible one either

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
